title: Codex reviewer-of-record unreachable: OPENAI_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
summary: The OpenAI codex CLI v0.128.0 is installed and authenticated against the key in X:/env_sync/user_portable.json (sk-proj-***[redacted]), but every `codex exec` returns 'ERROR: Quota exceeded. Check your plan and billing details.' The bridge correctly identifies this via the new detect_unreachable() guard and exits 2 (CODEX_UNREACHABLE=OPENAI_QUOTA_EXCEEDED).
doctrine_refs: A4 (critical): Forbidden: falling back to Claude self-review when Codex plugin is unreachable
O8 (critical): Two consecutive empty adversarial runs plus one clean ship gate required to advance a phase
C1-C4 (critical): Cert must show silent-twice on plan/diff/tests + clean ship gate
runbook_refs: CODEX_BRIDGE.md § 'When both plugin and bridge fail' → supervisor pauses queue advancement, drop incident WO, Telegram notify, no Claude self-review fallback
PLAN_CRITERIA.md §10: any phase that cannot reach silent-twice in 5 attempts triggers /codex:rescue --background and opens an incident WO; the phase remains open; no advance

evidence.codex_login_status: Logged in using an API key - sk-proj-***[redacted]
evidence.stderr_marker: ERROR: Quota exceeded. Check your plan and billing details.

resolution_required: Top up the OpenAI account billed against sk-proj-***[redacted], OR
Provide an alternate OPENAI_API_KEY with quota in X:/env_sync/user_portable.json (key 'OPENAI_API_KEY' is auto-loaded by codex_bridge.py)
resume_protocol: After quota is restored, run `python C:/Users/Owner/apex_governance/cc_runbook/codex_bridge.py adversarial-review C:/Users/Owner/apex_governance/_scratch/SP-A.0/smoke.txt --phase SP-A.0` to confirm exit 0. Then spawn a fresh kickoff context: 'Read C:\Users\Owner\apex_governance\cc_runbook\00_KICKOFF.md and execute end-to-end.' SP-A.0 will resume from Step 3.

closure_evidence.trigger: Quota restored on the OpenAI account billed against sk-proj-***[redacted] between 2026-05-04T00:08Z (initial smoke fail) and 2026-05-04T00:58Z (clearance test).
closure_evidence.clearance_run: codex_runs/SP-A.0/SP-A.0-adv-20260504T005821Z-79c63aaf.txt (returned 9 real findings against X:/api.py, proving live model + auth)
bridge_hardening: Added CODEX_AUTH_MODE switch (subscription default; apikey on demand) to call_codex/cmd_setup.

Tightened detect_unreachable() to only match on stderr / 'ERROR:'-prefixed stdout lines / HTTP-error markers, so codex finding text mentioning 'invalid api key' (as a vulnerability description) no longer triggers a false unreachable signal.
Pinned codex working dir to GOVERNANCE_ROOT via -C so reviews target the prompt's named path instead of latching onto unrelated workspaces.
